tagline: Authentic Nepalese & Indian cooking in Windsor
seoDescription: Himalayan Restaurant in Windsor serves authentic Nepalese and Indian cooking — kababs, tandoor, and fragrant curries, with many vegan and gluten-free dishes — voted Best Indian Restaurant five years running.
heroHeading: A Taste of Nepal and India
heroSubheading: Chef Bishnu's Himalayan Restaurant serves authentic Nepalese and Indian cooking — kababs, tandoor, and fragrant curries — to Windsor and beyond.
highlights: Authentic Nepalese & Indian — kabobs to curries
aboutBody: Established in 2010 and led by Head Chef Bishnu, Himalayan Restaurant brings authentic Nepalese and Indian cooking to Windsor and the surrounding community. The kitchen specializes in succulent kabobs, tandoor dishes, and fragrant, delicately seasoned curries and soups made to each guest’s spice preference.

Most of the menu is vegan- and gluten-free-friendly, and the restaurant has been named Best Indian Restaurant five years running (2021–2025) and Best of the North Bay 2025 by The Bohemian — a local favorite for dine-in, catering, and delivery.

services.title: Tandoor & Kababs
services.description: Succulent kabobs and tandoor-roasted specialties cooked over high heat.

services.title: Signature Curries
services.description: Fragrant, delicately seasoned curries made to your preferred spice level.

services.title: Nepalese Specialties
services.description: Authentic dishes from the Himalayan kitchen, beyond the familiar Indian classics.

services.title: Vegan & Gluten-Free
services.description: Most entrees are vegan- and gluten-free-friendly — something for every table.

services.title: Catering & Delivery
services.description: Full catering and delivery across Windsor and the surrounding area.
